prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia sits at a desk with exam books on one side and small game cards on the other. A loose calendar floats nearby. The mood is dreamlike and slightly funny, showing the strange relaxed rhythm of the second attempt.

Core meaning: the second exam attempt was looser and messier than expected, yet somehow succeeded.

Style: clean reflective Chinese blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, tiny blue screen glow. Minimal labels: "二战", "松散", "像梦一样".

Avoid mocking, avoid game-logo specificity, avoid clutter.
